channel.title: Linux on ~# cr1s1um > /dev/random
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on ~# cr1s1um > /dev/random

item.title: /* bannator.py: The 44 line Python Script That Blocks Brute Force Attacks (this script introduces you to programming!) */
item.description: Discover bannator.py: a 44 line Python script that blocks brute force attacks on Linux. A practical example of security and coding.

item.title: /* The Ultimate ViM Configuration (.vimrc) Every Developer Should Try */
item.description: A practical Vim configuration for developers and sysadmins, refined over years of work on Debian and Unix systems.
